name: 26L Stacking Clear Bin with Lid - Brightroom™: Plastic, Stackable, Universal Storage, 21.53" x 14.92" x 5.9"
description:
Optimize your storage with the help of this Stacking Clear Bin with Lid from Brightroom™. Designed in a cubical silhouette, this bin offers space for storing household items such as books, clothing items, craft supplies and more, helping you keep your space organized, while the clear design lets you view the contents from the outside. Cutout handles on each side make it easy to lift and carry, while the indexed lid not only helps keep the contents secure, but also allows different storage bins to be neatly stacked on top of each other for space-saving organization.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
